description: A clean, modern designed infographic 'year in review' card from the White House. The background is a dark navy-to-gray gradient. A white serif/sans headline at the top reads '2025 Policy Wins' (with '2025' in an italic serif). A large rounded off-white card fills most of the frame, headed by the bold dark-navy word 'Economy'. Below are five bulleted claims in dark text, with two phrases highlighted in bright yellow marker-style: 'Congress passed the Working Families Tax Cut, delivering the largest tax cut in American history, increasing Americans' take-home pay by as much as $13,300, and terminating benefits for at least 1.4 million illegal immigrants who were gaming the system.'; '687,000 private sector jobs were added, with 100% of all net job creation going to American-born citizens.'; 'Nominal private sector weekly earnings are on track to rise 4.2% in President Trump's first year.'; 'President Trump has secured tens of trillions in private and foreign investment.'; 'The U.S. Treasury has taken in over $235 billion in tariff duties since January 2025.' The yellow highlighting steers the eye to the 'largest tax cut' and 'American-born citizens' claims, tying economic success to the anti-illegal-immigration agenda. Messaging technique: bulleted statistical self-congratulation. Target audience: general public, recapping first-year MAGA economic accomplishments.
notable_text: 2025 Policy Wins - Economy; largest tax cut in American history; 100% of all net job creation going to American-born citizens; over $235 billion in tariff duties since January 2025
